evals.expected_output: The skill removes all ML Kit barcode-scanning APIs (BarcodeScanning, BarcodeScannerOptions, InputImage, the CameraX analyze pipeline) and replaces them with a BarcodeBatch integration: DataCaptureContext, Camera with BarcodeBatch.createRecommendedCameraSettings, DataCaptureView, BarcodeBatchBasicOverlay, and a BarcodeBatchListener whose onSessionUpdated processes tracked barcodes. It maps the ML Kit formats to Scandit symbologies (FORMAT_EAN_13 -> Symbology.EAN13_UPCA, FORMAT_QR_CODE -> Symbology.QR, FORMAT_CODE_128 -> Symbology.CODE128), preserves the deduplicated scannedValues list, and uses the tracking identifier so each physical barcode is counted once. Shows a summary and setup checklist.

assertions.text: com.google.mlkit import is NOT present in the migrated code blocks (semantic)
BarcodeScanning is NOT used in the migrated code (may appear in a before/after summary table) (semantic)
BarcodeScannerOptions is NOT used in the migrated code (semantic)
InputImage is NOT used in the migrated code (semantic)
com.scandit.datacapture import IS present
BarcodeBatch.forDataCaptureContext( is used (not a direct BarcodeBatch constructor)
BarcodeBatchListener is implemented with onSessionUpdated
Symbology.EAN13_UPCA is enabled (mapped from FORMAT_EAN_13)
Symbology.QR is enabled (mapped from FORMAT_QR_CODE, not Symbology.QR_CODE which does not exist)
Symbology.CODE128 is enabled (mapped from FORMAT_CODE_128)
Symbology.QR_CODE does NOT appear as a Symbology enum value (Barcode.FORMAT_QR_CODE in a summary table is acceptable) (semantic)
DataCaptureView.newInstance( is used and set as the content view
BarcodeBatchBasicOverlay.newInstance( is called
Camera.getDefaultCamera(BarcodeBatch.createRecommendedCameraSettings()) is used
The scannedValues list (or equivalent accumulator) is preserved
Deduplication is preserved, keyed by the TrackedBarcode tracking identifier so each tracked barcode is handled once
session data is copied out before runOnUiThread (the session is not accessed off the recognition thread) (semantic)
A summary of changes is shown with what was removed and what was added
Setup checklist mentions com.scandit.datacapture:barcode and com.scandit.datacapture:core Gradle dependencies
A concrete version number is used for the dependencies (not a [version] placeholder)
Setup checklist mentions the CAMERA permission (CAMERA or AndroidManifest)
